mascot_greeting: Hi {name}! I'm Poly, your AI friend!

parent.annotation_sticker_desc: Place stickers on objects — best for younger kids
parent.annotation_catch_desc: Tap objects as they appear — best for older kids
parent.ui_mascot_desc: A friendly character guides your child step by step
parent.ui_icon_desc: Big colorful buttons with no text — visual learning
parent.ui_audio_desc: Every button speaks its name — helps with vocabulary
parent.interaction_logic_desc: If the AI sees X → Do Y (like Scratch)
parent.interaction_story_desc: Objects come alive and talk to your child
